author: maintainer-agent

patch.value:
## Changes Required

### 1) .github/workflows/release.yml
- Trigger on version tags (v*.*.*)
- Run full build + typecheck + test + coverage gate
- Then publish to npm via NODE_AUTH_TOKEN
- Upload coverage artifact

### 2) ci.yml and nightly.yml
- Add Node 24 to CI matrix (ubuntu-latest + Node 24)
- Nightly: add Node 24 alongside 20 and 22

### 3) PRD/README/AGENTS doc updates
- Update PRD Milestone 6 checklist to include release workflow
- Update README Release Readiness Checklist to mention release workflow
- Update CHANGELOG under [Unreleased]
Add automated npm release workflow and Node 24 CI coverage

The repository lacks an automated npm publishing workflow triggered by version tags. Additionally, Node 24 (current release, will become LTS Oct 2025) is not in the CI matrix. Both are production-readiness requirements for a widely-used npm package.
Pushing a v0.1.0 tag triggers CI + npm publish; Node 24 appears in ci.yml and nightly.yml matrix; docs updated; tests pass at 100%
Release workflow template designed; Node 24 confirmed as current release.
Automate npm publish and widen Node compatibility matrix
Eliminates manual publish steps and ensures compatibility with future Node LTS
Reduces release friction; increases confidence in Node version compatibility
Automated releases on tag push; CI confirms Node 24 compatibility
Project is at v0.1 release milestone; automated publish is standard for production npm packages

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: This task addresses the two remaining production-readiness gaps identified in the baseline audit: missing release automation and Node 24 CI coverage.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation plan: (1) Create .github/workflows/release.yml with tag-trigger publish flow. (2) Add Node 24 to ci.yml matrix. (3) Add Node 24 to nightly.yml. (4) Update docs. (5) Run full coverage suite to confirm no regressions.

value.note: document new CI and release features

message: Create release workflow + Node 24 CI task | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings,assignee,parent,reviewer,sprint,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,reporter,severity,environment,repro_steps,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,affected_version,fixed_version,component,regression,customer_impact
